title: I Reviewed All 50 AI Side Hustle Videos. Here Is What You Actually Get for $5.
excerpt: I downloaded and reviewed all 50 AI Side Hustle Videos with Unrestricted PLR. Here is my honest hands-on experience with the bundle, video quality, and resale potential at $5.
html:
Product Overview

What Is the 50 AI Side Hustle Videos Bundle?

This is a collection of 50 done-for-you video packs, each covering a specific AI-powered side hustle strategy. Every video pack includes the MP4 file, professional voiceover audio, slide PNGs, a full voiceover script, and on-screen text content. The bundle comes with Unrestricted PLR, which means you can resell, rebrand, or bundle these videos as your own product and keep 100% of every sale.

I spent a full afternoon going through the download. The moment I opened the first folder, I realized this was not another generic AI course. Each folder is organized the same way: video, audio, slides, and scripts. Everything is ready to go. No extra tools needed.

The product is sold through WarriorPlus at a $5 launch price (regular $49). It is a one-time payment with instant download access. No subscription, no hidden fees. The files are delivered as organized ZIP folders divided by video topic.

Watch Before You Buy

3 Real Videos From the Bundle. Press Play.

No mockups, no stock footage. These are actual videos included in your $5 download. Every one of the 50 looks exactly like this.

AI Etsy Product Promo Videos Video 14 · Sell on Etsy

That is just 3 of 50. There are 47 more complete videos inside the bundle.

50 complete video packs. Instant download. Resell rights included.

Get All 50 Videos for $5

3 Paths to Profit

Pick Your Path. All 3 Work With This Bundle.

Watch the videos, follow the 30-day plans, and launch your own AI side hustle. Each video breaks down exact tools, costs under $50/mo, and step-by-step workflows.

Best for: beginners who want action steps

02

List the full 50-video bundle on Etsy, Gumroad, or Payhip at $27 to $97. Rebrand the package as your own product. One sale covers your cost 5 to 19 times over.

Best for: PLR sellers and digital product flippers

03

Content Machine

Upload videos to YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram. Use slides as thumbnails. Repurpose scripts into blog posts. 50 videos equals months of content without creating from scratch.

Best for: faceless channel builders

Honest Assessment

"If It Is Only $5, Is It Actually Good?"

Fair question. I asked the same thing before buying. Here is what I found after downloading and reviewing the bundle:

What You Get

  • Every video is 1080p MP4 with professional voiceover
  • Each includes slide PNGs + script.txt + slide.txt
  • Strategies are specific with tools, pricing, and case studies
  • Unrestricted PLR lets you resell, rebrand, and bundle freely

What It Is NOT

  • Not a "course" with 40 hours of theory
  • Not recycled ChatGPT blog posts
  • Not restricted use. You own commercial rights
  • Not a subscription. Pay once, download forever

The price is low because it is a launch special to get this in front of buyers fast. The real value is in the done-for-you work you would otherwise spend weeks creating yourself.

FAQ

Quick Answers

Are these really done-for-you videos I can use immediately?
Yes. Every video is a complete 1080p MP4 with professional voiceover, slide graphics, and full scripts. You can upload them directly to YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, or list them for sale on Etsy and Gumroad. No editing, filming, or additional tools required.
Can I really resell this entire bundle?
Yes. The bundle includes Unrestricted PLR, which grants full commercial rights. You can resell the entire 50-video collection at any price you choose, rebrand it with your name and logo, bundle it into courses or memberships, and use individual videos as lead magnets. You keep 100% of every sale with no royalties.
Why is it only $5?
This is a launch special designed to get the product in front of buyers quickly. The regular price is $49. The low launch price builds social proof and reviews fast. The quality is not compromised, the pricing is a marketing strategy.
What format are the files?
Each video pack includes: an MP4 video file (1080p, 3 to 4 minutes), MP3 voiceover audio files, PNG slide graphics, and TXT scripts (voiceover script and on-screen text). Everything is organized into clearly named folders. Download size varies per video but is optimized for fast delivery.
Do I need video editing skills?
No. The videos are fully produced and ready to upload. If you want to customize them, you have access to all source files including scripts and slide PNGs. The scripts are plain text, so you can edit them with any text editor and re-record voiceovers if desired.
Is there a refund policy?
Yes. There is a 30-day money-back guarantee. Download the bundle, review the videos, and if you are not satisfied with the quality or the PLR terms, contact the vendor for a full refund. All refund requests are handled directly by the product vendor, not WarriorPlus.

My Verdict

What I Like and What to Consider

What I Like

  • 50 complete, organized video packs ready to use or sell
  • Professional 1080p quality with real voiceovers, not AI TTS
  • Unrestricted PLR lets you build a real digital product business
  • $5 launch price means one resale covers your investment 5× or more
  • Instant download with no subscription or recurring fees
  • Wide variety of niches from finance to fitness to SaaS
  • 30-day action plans make each strategy actionable

What to Consider

  • Launch price is temporary and returns to $49 after the intro period
  • Videos are 3 to 4 minutes each, designed for short-form platforms
  • PLR means others may also sell the same videos, so branding matters
  • Results depend on your execution and platform compliance knowledge
  • No ongoing support community or membership area included

Ideal For

Who Should and Should Not Buy This Bundle

Perfect For

  • ✓ Beginners who want done-for-you video content to start a side hustle
  • ✓ PLR sellers looking for fresh inventory to list on Etsy, Gumroad, or Payhip
  • ✓ Faceless YouTube and TikTok channel builders needing months of content
  • ✓ Digital product flippers who want a $5 asset they can resell at $27 to $97
  • ✓ Affiliate marketers needing video content for blogs and social media

Not For

  • ✗ People expecting a 40-hour comprehensive video course
  • ✗ Those unwilling to spend time branding and positioning PLR content
  • ✗ Anyone looking for exclusive, one-of-a-kind original video production
  • ✗ Buyers who want advanced video editing training or filmmaking skills
